summary: COMPARISON two Axes side by side: LEFT shows uniform density f_X(x)=1 on [0,1] in BLUE; RIGHT shows the transformed density f_Y(y)=1/(2√y) in RED — the arcsine-like density. 300 sampled BLUE_B dots on the left (uniform in x) connect via grey Lines to RED_B dots on the right (piled up near 0), illustrating the probability mass concentration. Bottom derivation via change of variables: f_Y(y) = f_X(x(y))|dx/dy| = 1·(1/2√y).
